rules.rule_text:
private rule IsRTF : RTF
{
	meta:
		description = "Identifier for RTF files"
		author = "Seth Hardy"
		last_modified = "2014-05-05"

	strings:
		$magic = /^\s*{\\rt/

	condition:
		$magic
}

private rule IsOLE : OLE
{
	meta:
		description = "Identifier for OLE files"
		author = "Seth Hardy"
		last_modified = "2014-05-06"

	strings:
		$magic = {d0 cf 11 e0 a1 b1 1a e1}

	condition:
		$magic at 0
}
